title: Create a New Meeting
description: Schedule a new meeting in Teams calendar

steps.action: Click the Calendar icon on the left sidebar
Click the '+ New meeting' button at the top right
Type the meeting title in the 'Add title' field
Add attendees by typing names in the 'Add required attendees' field
Select the correct person from suggestions
Set the date and time for the meeting
Click the 'Send' button to create the meeting and send invites

expectedResult: Meeting is created and invitations are sent to attendees
